26991.headline: Ulmere obsidian knife was created.
26991.description: Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th created Ulmere obsidian knife, a personal masterwork obsidian blade, in Nordrim.

26992.headline: Ulmere obsidian knife was recorded as pristine.
26992.description: Ulmere obsidian knife entered recorded history in pristine condition when Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th created it. Severity 0.02.

26993.headline: Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th became attached to Ulmere obsidian knife.
26993.description: Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th formed craft pride around Ulmere obsidian knife after "Ulmere obsidian knife was created".. Intensity 0.687.

26994.headline: Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th formed respect toward Jaspmarsh Lineage.
26994.description: Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th formed respect toward Jaspmarsh Lineage after remembering "Hesta Jaspmarsh the 9th became attached to Ulmere obsidian knife". Intensity 0.63; valence 0.63.

26995.headline: Arno Junton completed an apprenticeship.

26996.headline: Arno Junton's mining skill was recorded.

26997.headline: Beda Nyrfield the 5th's mining skill was recorded.

26998.headline: Arno Junton became a miner.

26999.headline: House of Torreach was built.
